MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-08-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MATTHEW B. LEE OF BRAYTON & PURCELL, LLP, TEL. NO. 898-1555 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. PAUL J. GAMBA OF VASQUEZ, ESTRADA & DUMONT LLP, TEL. NO. 453-0555 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY ALTA BUILDING MATERIAL COMPANY.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT ALTA BUILDING MATERIAL COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED; DEFENDANT HAS NOT SHIFTED THE BURDEN IN LIGHT OF PLAINTIFF'S DISCOVERY RESPONSES; IN ANY EVENT, PLAINTIFF HAS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT THROUGH THE DIXON DECLARATION, THE OBJECTIONS TO WHICH ARE OVERRULED. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
